chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 766 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of MA 10060/2025. 12.12.2025. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State alongwith Sain Bux SHO PS Dadu. = None present for applicant/proposed accused No.7. No intimation is received. The respondent No.7, Touqueer Ahmed who was the complainant in Criminal Miscellaneous Application decided by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace which pursuant to the orders passed by this (High) Court was disposed of vide order dated 24.10.2025, submits that the matter has been compromised for whatever it is worth at this stage when this lis already stands disposed of. Be that as it may, he no longer wishes to pursue the contempt application and the said alleged contempt application should be treated as withdrawn. Order accordingly. Contempt application is dismissed in the above terms. JUDGE Tufail
